backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining core types (CitizenID, EligibilityRecord) and state (balance, eligible map, paid set) with placeholder functions for benefit claim processing.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a requirement to make a generated CSV file (jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv) accessible as a downloadable static asset in the frontend.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components including App, Layout, AdminDashboard, TransactionForm, TransactionHistory, styling, and hooks for the Jan-Dhan Gateway application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the application's design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Jan-Dhan Gateway application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component with tab navigation between transaction processing (TransactionForm + TransactionHistory) and admin dashboard views.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin control panel displaying system status, emergency pause controls, budget monitoring, transaction counts, and security features with mock state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout wrapper with header (Jan-Dhan Gateway branding, security indicators), main content area, and footer with attribution links.
Benefit claim submission form with citizen ID input, scheme selection, simulated three-gate validation display, and approval/rejection result rendering.
frontend/src/components/TransactionHisto: Transaction history viewer displaying recent benefit claims with status badges, timestamps, amounts, and rejection reasons in a scrollable list with mock data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor using Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for system status and transaction history that poll backend every 5 seconds, currently returning mock data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for a trust-and-security themed color palette using OKLCH color space, supporting both light and dark modes with deep blue primary and teal accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), OKLCH-based color system, security-themed shadows, and custom animations for accordion and pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state document defining Jan-Dhan Gateway as a fraud-proof benefit distribution system with SHA-256 ID hashing, hash-linked ledger, three-gate validation (eligibility/budget/frequency), ₹10L budget, and 2000-record CSV dataset integration with admin kill-switch features.
